transcript.text:
I will take 1 of each, please
5 bowls of noodles! Their portion is great
Should I eat some pork belly as well?
It tastes so good!
Stop eating!
I need more
Is.. is she going to be able to finish it all?
Hello, everyone!
I am here at a noodles place
This place was recommended to me by a villager here
I am here to film here because I wanted to eat here
"Filming" is just an excuse I'm here just because I want to eat here [It's actually her 5th visit]
Yay, it's going to be great!
Hello
I'm here again
Why?

I'm here to eat here again
Again!?
[They have gotten pretty close due to frequent visits]
How do you like Yokji island?
You like it?
Yes, I love it here
You can go fishing,
It's very healing
[Chit-chatting while peeling the garlic]
Okay stop now, go eat
[Checking the camera screen] Okay, looking good
They have regular cold noodles, spicy cold noodles, noodles with young summer radish kimchi, spicy noodles, cold soybean noodles,
My favorite was the regular spicy noodles It's the best
Excuse me, I'll order one of each noodles, all 5 of them
[Not even surprised anymore] No cucumbers?
Yes, thank you

[Her first visit] Finished 3 bowls of noodles
Really!? Did you eat all of this?
I thought you were just kidding
She ordered all of the noodles, plus an extra one
[Not surprised anymore]
I ate here before Their side dishes taste great as well
Everything tasted good
Should I eat some pork belly?
They give you a lot of noodles though
Eh.. whatever
[Ordered 2 servings of pork belly]
Thank you
Let's cook all of this first
And move them to a plate
Thank you
It's hot

I better hurry up
I did a good job, right?
Bon appetit!
Let's try one
Their ssamjang (soybean seasoning paste) taste really good too
I ate pork belly cooked from the charcoal last time
But I prefer the frying pan It tastes better
[Slides the greens away]
The pork belly tastes so good
I need to wait for the noodles
But I can't stop eating it
[Can't stop, won't stop]
I just keep eating
Stop eating!
Just 1 more
[Here it comes!]

Eat a lot!
5 bowls of noodles
I tried everything else except for the spicy cold noodles I'm going to eat that first
Bon appetit
That looks scrumptious
There's radish kimchi in all of them except for the soybean noodles
The soybean noodles usually come with the cucumbers, but I asked for no cucumbers
This.. this tastes so good
This is my first time trying this one
It's the best
This tastes really good
The 2 spicy noodles are absolutely delicious
The radish kimchi
Wow.. That's so good
Cold noodles
This is Radish kimchi cold noodles

I like the cold noodles better than the regular one
It's very windy outside
Even the water here tastes good
Everything is good
Time for the soybean noodles
I like to eat this salty [Adds salt]
It's amazing
I don't usually eat this
But it tastes so good here
Now,
Time for my favorite: Spicy noodles
This is the real deal
It's so good Wait, is the cold noodles better!?
Out of the 2 spicy noodles
The sauce is very similar, so I think it depends on what type of noodles you prefer [Regular noodles vs chewy noodles]
Both taste great

This is good too
Rankings?
Tie 1st place for the spicy noodles Can't decide
3rd - soybean cold noodles 4th - cold noodles 5 - radish kimchi noodles
Wait, no They're all good. I can't rank them
3rd, 4th, 5th
It's because I don't really enjoy eating soybean noodles Although it tastes great
Next.. next...
The bowl that has the most
It's a little bland than usual
It's so spicy
I must've eaten something wrong The noodles itself is not spicy
I'm going to cool down with pork belly
How does it taste this good?
Viewer: Don't drink too much of that soup, it has a lot of sodium
But that's the best part

[I love sodium]
It's cold!
I need more meat What's so spicy here?
[Viewer: drink the soybean soup] Oh, you're right
[I love sodium]
The soup tastes so good
It's so much better than the noodles
It's very nutty
You are 3rd place again!
[Clean]
My pork belly~ Thank you
1 additional serving
That looks good
Which one is going to taste better? The one I cooked or the one she cooked?
This one tastes so much better!
Why does it taste different?

It's completely different
Let's eat it together
This is the most 'young radish water kimchi' I've consumed in a day
Let's gather all the soup in 1 bowl
Let's wrap pork belly with the noodles
KBBQ goes well with spicy noodles
That's crazy
How does she make the seasoning? I want to learn her recipe
[How did you do it!?]
It's so tasty
It's the best
Does it taste good?
It's the best!
People tell you that you're a good cook, right?
I heard it a lot
No lie

For real!
No, you're a really good cook
I ate so much radish kimchi today
[Finished]
Very nice
Thanks everyone~
Did you finish it all? Yes
As a restaurant owner, I love seeing customers that can eat well
[Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
